steps.title: Build two rows for the house value
steps.content: At $x=0$, the house is worth $181{,}000$. A $4.5\%$ yearly increase means multiply by $1.045$ after one year, so the next value is $181{,}000(1.045)=189{,}145$.

steps.title: Find the exponential pattern
steps.content: An exponential growth model has the form $f(x)=a(b)^x$, where $a$ is the starting value and $b$ is the yearly multiplier. Here, $a=181{,}000$ and $b=1.045$, so $f(x)=181{,}000(1.045)^x$.

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content: Choice A uses $0.045$ as the whole multiplier, and choice B uses $0.45$; both are less than $1$, so they model decreases. Choice D uses $1.45$, which is a $45\%$ increase. Choice C uses $1.045$, the growth multiplier for a $4.5\%$ increase. Choice C is correct.
